metadata.description: ringback — let your AI agent call your phone (two-way voice) and send tiered alerts, over free self-hosted SIP.

plugins.name: ringback
plugins.description: Your AI agent calls your phone for a two-way voice conversation plus tiered alerts (runs the engine in Docker). Presence-aware: it only calls when you are away from the keyboard.

plugins.name: ringback-channel
plugins.description: Experimental: a phone channel that wakes an idle Claude Code session on your spoken reply.
